svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-021 reached 1.3709 val_bpb. 27 scored runs are tracked here, with 10 kept and 17 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260329-023 (discard) tested the stronger frontier may have outgrown `kv2`, so less KV sharing (`q8/kv4`) could recover quality.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
